lyrics.title: Test
lyrics.value:
[00:15.32]A test, a test, a test, no rest
[00:21.03]No rest, no rest
[00:23.23]Just when you wanna exhale
[00:26.09]You'll go downhill
[00:28.30]He stands in the light, kisses your ears
[00:30.83]Just when you wanna relax
[00:33.81]Wanna be alone
[00:35.47]A crowd comes
[00:38.08]Then a test, a test, a test, no rest
[00:44.08]No rest, no rest
[01:01.49]Just when you wanna give up
[01:04.32]And everything's flat
[01:06.24]Emotions running back and forth
[01:09.96]There's no rest, no rest
[01:17.07]Hurry to be on track
[01:19.68]Don't wanna walk back
[01:24.53]Steady on the elevator lift to the top
[01:30.19]Then a stop, a challenge
[01:34.88]Confess confess
[01:37.05]I don't stop, no way
[01:40.90]Up and down the hill
[01:44.99]All around the carousel
[01:49.42]A flowery smell
[01:53.25]A dead end
[02:02.68]A stop, a stop, a challenge
[02:06.53]Confess, confess
[02:56.58]The test, a test, a test no rest
[03:02.55]No rest, no rest
[03:04.44]Just when you think it's the end
[03:07.18]And everything's black
[03:09.25]Hiding in the dark there's a sudden flash light
[03:14.58]And you're back
[03:19.90]Back on the elevator lift to the top, another stop
[03:30.13]A test, a test
[03:35.43]Test, test, test, test...
[03:41.36]Oh, my life's a
[03:42.76]Test, test, test, test...
[03:49.16]Every day's a
[03:50.59]Test, test, test, test...
